reviews.review_description: Very simple and i love the idea. Kind of like grass cutting incremental. Suggesting: ( instead of just normal things. There are also other things you can do for banans. Such as [ infection: it tracks how much you earn per collect and it gives you 100 times that when you win!. Quests: there is a boss monkey and he gives you orders to get more banans. Lastly mini enchantments: when you unlock something new, you get a menu  in front of you with three options, boost Production of banan, the one you unlocked, or the previous one you unlocked. AGAIN THIS GAME HAS SO MANY OTHER THINGS YOU CAN ADD SO MAKE UP SOME AMAZING IDEAS!!!!!!
This is peak, but please add multiplayer!
doesnt let me play this peak looking game i want to play this rly peak looking game when you do i will give you 5 stars
